title: bgc Christmas Reindeer Squeaky Dog Toy 21cm

features: Made with premium quality latex for long lasting play and textural design
With internal squeaker that emits a captivating squeak with every squeeze for increased engagement at playtime
Engages your dog’s natural instincts fulfilling their desires to thrash, chase, fetch, shake and more
Great for interactive and solo play, keeping your dog entertained and helping to build a special bond between pet and owner
A fun filled, festive themed squeaky latex Reindeer for dogs
description: Product description A fun filled festive latex toy for your dog, the Good Boy Squeaky Reindeer is the perfect stocking filler for playful pups to keep them happy, healthy and entertained this Christmas. Made with high quality latex materials for a soft outer and longer lasting design, the Good Boy Squeaky Reindeer is perfect for indoor and outdoor light play, adding festive fun to every game of fetch as well as providing hours of solo squeaking entertainment. Brightly coloured with a charming Reindeer design, it’s a great addition to your dog’s toy box this Christmas, sure to keep tails wagging and the excitement high! Designed with an internal squeaker for engaging games every day, the Good Boy Squeaky Reindeer encourages your dog’s natural instincts to play and chase, as well as squeak! With a loud, clear squeak that emits with every squeeze, it ignites your dog’s primal instincts to fetch, thrash and more, perfect for soft play anywhere, with a fun, festive twist! Suitable for all breeds, it measures approximately 11.5cm long, with a lightweight design making sure it’s easy to carry and hold. Directions squeaky toys
